ty.story_message:
First,
Josh tried their best to Repair Tha Barn and somehow made it look like a five-star resort for farm animals. The farmers celebrated with some of Aunt Myrna's Party cheese salad!
Due to due to throwing out his back riding the mechanical bull at the local bar, Josh became injured and will miss 0 matchday(s).
Then,
Vrock tried their best to Chase Tha Coyote but ran headfirst into a wall that was painted to look like a tunnel. Josh and Jared were both very disappointed in Vrock.
Due to after a silo fell and crushed his legs, Vrock became injured and will miss 0 matchday(s).
Finally,
Jared tried their best to Lift Tha Hay but the haybales got the best of them. Josh and Vrock were both very disappointed in Jared.

YeeeeeeHawww! That's all the news for this matchday. Stay tuned for more Farmington News! YEEEEEHAWWWW!

jared.story_message:
First,
Zach tried their best to Fix Tha Tractor but somehow made it worse, now it's a lawn ornament. Luke and Mezzy were both very disappointed in Zach.
Due to blowing out his fat wife's back, Zach became injured and will miss 0 matchday(s).
Then,
Luke was ready to work, but due to their previous injury they failed and collected no points.
Finally,
Mezzy tried their best to Push Tha Car but the car stayed put. Sounds like someone forgot to put it in neutral. Zach and Luke were both very disappointed in Mezzy.

YeeeeeeHawww! That's all the news for this matchday. Stay tuned for more Farmington News! YEEEEEHAWWWW!
jared.catastrophe_message: A devastating drought hit, ruining all crop-related work!

bob.story_message:
First,
Tyler tried their best to Build Tha Fence but the only thing he nailed was his own finger. Now a sheep is nailing his wife. Tyrone and Morris were both very disappointed in Tyler.
Then,
Tyrone tried their best to Mow Tha Lawn and made it look so good that even the weeds started lining up to apologize. The whole farm celebrated with a hamburger bubble-up meal!
Finally,
Morris was ready to work, but due to their previous injury they failed and collected no points.

YeeeeeeHawww! That's all the news for this matchday. Stay tuned for more Farmington News! YEEEEEHAWWWW!
bob.catastrophe_message: Oh no! Morris got heat stroke and struggled to do their task.
